title: Improving Neurotrauma by Depolarization Inhibition With Combination Therapy (INDICT)

skipped_criteria: Inclusion (1): Clinical indication for emergency craniotomy with dural opening — requires surgical plan/indication data not available in schema.
Inclusion (1): Within 72 hours post-trauma — requires temporal logic (time since injury) not available in schema.
Exclusion (1): Persistent bilateral non-reactive pupils or other evidence of non-survivable injury — requires neurological exam findings not available in schema.
Exclusion (2): Decompressive craniectomy to treat refractory ICP subsequent to diffuse injury — requires surgical history and ICP management data not available in schema.
Exclusion (3): Co-enrollment in another therapeutic TBI trial — requires enrollment status in other trials, not available in schema.
